Suitable for manufacturing aerospace parts with high reliability, lightweight and complex structure

Aerospace projects usually have higher requirements on material strength, weight control, complex structure forming and dimensional consistency. We help customers reduce uncertainty during prototype validation and low-volume delivery phases by collaborating on DFM reviews, fixture solutions, machining paths, surface preparation and inspection plans.
